Table Definitions

tblADSync

This table contains information gained via Active Directory.

COLUMN NAME DATATYPE LENGTH DESCRIPTION

oADID

varchar

36

The ID of the Active Directory Synchronization Profile in Process Director

sName

nvarchar

256

The name of the AD

sDesc

nvarchar

1024

The description of the AD

nContextType

int

 

 

sContextName

nvarchar

1024

 

sContextContainer

nvarchar

1024

 

sUserID

nvarchar

64

User’s ID

sPassword

nvarchar

64

User’s Password

fSecure

tinyint

1

Boolean: determines if AD should be secured

sUsersMustBelongTo

nvarchar

512

 

sGroupsMustBelongTo

nvarchar

512

 

fDebug

tinyint

1

Determines whether AD Sync is in debug mode

fTestMode

tinyint

1

Determines whether AD Sync is in Test Mode

fSyncUsers

tinyint

1

Determines if PD should sync users with the AD

fSyncGroups

tinyint

1

Determines if the PD should sync groups with the AD

oAddToPIDs

varchar

1024

ID of the partitions this AD group will be synced to

oAddToGIDs

varchar

1024

 

fAddOnlyUsers

tinyint

1

Determines if only users should be added to the active directory

fAddOnlyGroups

tinyint

1

Determines If only groups should be added to the active directory

fSyncUsersInGroups

tinyint

1

 

sLDAP_URL

nvarchar

 

The URL of the LDAP server

sLDAP_UserFilter

nvarchar

 

The user filter string on the LDAP calls

sLDAP_GroupFilter

nvarchar

 

The group filter string on the LDAP calls

nDirectoryType

Int

 

The type of user directory

nLDAP_AuthTypes

Int

 

The authentication type used when connecting to the LDAP server

sLDAP_GUID_Field

nvarchar

64

The field in the LDAP server containing the user’s GUID

sLDAP_UserID_Field

nvarchar

64

The field in the LDAP server containing the user’s User ID

sLDAP_Alias_Field

nvarchar

64

The field in the LDAP server containing the user’s alias

sLDAP_Email_Field

nvarchar

64

The field in the LDAP server containing the user’s email

sLDAP_Groups_Field

nvarchar

64

The field in the LDAP server containing the groups to which the user belongs

sProperty_Phone

nvarchar

64

The field in the LDAP server containing the user’s phone number

sProperty_Descrption

nvarchar

64

The field in the LDAP server containing the user’s description

sProperty_Title

nvarchar

64

The field in the LDAP server containing the user’s Title

sProperty_Office

nvarchar

64

The field in the LDAP server containing the user’s office

sProperty_Company

nvarchar

64

The field in the LDAP server containing the user’s company

sProperty_Dept

nvarchar

64

The field in the LDAP server containing the user’s department
sProperty_Country

nvarchar

64

The field in the LDAP server containing the user's country.

sProperty_CustomStr

nvarchar

64

The field in the LDAP server containing a custom string for the user

sProperty_CustomStr2

nvarchar

64

The field in the LDAP server containing another custom string for the user

sProperty_CustomDate

nvarchar

64

The field in the LDAP server containing a custom date for the user

sProperty_CustomNumber

nvarchar

64

The field in the LDAP server containing a custom number for the user
sProperty_Location

nvarchar

64

The field in the LDAP server containing the user's location.
nLastResult int   Integer value of the last AD Sync Result
sLastResult nvarchar 256 text Value of the last AD sync Result
tlastRun datetime   The last time the Sync was run
sProperty_BusinessUnit nvarchar 64 The field in the LDAP server containing the user's business unit.
sProperty_Manager nvarchar 64 The field in the LDAP server containing the user's manager.
sProperty_LegalEntity nvarchar 64 The field in the LDAP server containing the user's Legal Entity.
tCreateTime datetime   When the sync was created.
tLastModified datetime   When the sync was last modified.
fRemoveUsersFromGroups tinyint   Flag to remove users from groups not listed in the current import.
fAddAsDayPassUsers tinyint   Flag to add user as a day pass user.
tblAppEvent

This table contains information for an entry in the application events log.

COLUMN NAME DATATYPE LENGTH DESCRIPTION
oAPPEVENTID

varchar

36

 Primary Key
oID

varchar

36

  
nCommentType

int

 

  

oPID

varchar

36

Category’s partition ID
oCONDSETID

varchar

36

 The condition set associate with the Event
sAppEventText

varchar

MAX

 Text of the event
nOrder

int

 

  
sIconColor

nvarchar

64

  
nIcon

int

 

  
sGroupNames

nvarchar

1024

  
sName

varchar

256

  
tblAuditLog

This table contains information for an entry in an item’s audit log.

COLUMN NAME DATATYPE LENGTH DESCRIPTION

nLogType

int

 

The type of audit log.

oUID

varchar

36

ID of the user involved

sUserName

nvarchar

256

Name of the user involved

tUpdate

datetime

 

Time this item was added to the log

oFORMINSTID

varchar

36

ID of the Form Instance involved

oFCID

varchar

36

ID of the form control involved

sFieldName

nvarchar

64

 

sDisplayName

nvarchar

256

 

sPrevValue

nvarchar

2000

 

sNewValue

nvarchar

2000

 

oWFINSTID

varchar

36

ID of the workflow involved

oSTINSTID

varchar

36

ID of the workflow step involved

sWorkflowName

nvarchar

256

Name of the workflow involved

sStepName

nvarchar

128

Name of the step involved

sComment

nvarchar

1024

 

sBranchName

nvarchar

128

 

oLOGID

varchar

36

ID of this audit log

nArrayNum

int

 

 

oPRINSTID

varchar

36

ID of the process instance involved

oACTINSTID

varchar

36

 

sProjectName

nvarchar

256

Name of the timeline involved

sActivityName

nvarchar

128

Name of the timeline activity involved

oImpersonatedByUID

varchar

36

UID of the user impersonating the user who changed form data

sImpersonatedByUserName

nvarchar

 

Name of the user impersonating the user who changed form data.

nAuditType

int

 

 Please see the table below for an enumeration of nAuditType values, as the list is rather lengthy.
sIPAddress nvarchar 32 IP Address of the User
oPID

varchar

36

  
sUserID

varchar

64

 User ID of the user
oID

varchar

36

  
sObjectName

nvarchar

256

 The object name of the auited Process Director object
nObjectType int   The type of object audited.
sAuditText

nvarchar

1024

  
sExternalGUID

nvarchar

256

  
oCASEINSTID

varchar

36

  
oCASEPROPID

varchar

36

  
sPropertyName

varchar

64

  

nAuditType Enumeration

The table below lists the numeric values for each nAuditType, and the audit type that corresponds to each value.

  nAuditType Audit Type Description
0 NotSet

1

 Login
2 Login
3 AuthenticateFailed
4 DeleteObject
5 CreateObject
6 UpdateObject
7 MoveObject
8 PasswordChange
9 CreateUser
10 DeleteUser
11 CreateGroup
12 DeleteGroup
13 WebService
14 TaskCompleted
15 TaskCompleted
16 TaskRemoved
17 Signature
18 RollbackActivity
19 CancelActivity
20 CancelActivity
21 RestartTimeline
22 SyncStart
23 SyncEnd
24 JumpToStep
25 CancelStep
26 StopStep
27 StopWorkflow
28 RestartWorkflow
29 UpdateUser
30 AddUserToGroup
31 RemoveUserFromGroup
32 RemoveObjectFromParent
33 DownloadDocument
34 ViewFormData
35 PermissionAdded
36 PermissionAdded
37 PermissionUpdated
38 PermissionReplicated
39 PermissionGiven // Elevated priviledges given (escalated permissions)
40 PermissionDeniedView
41 PermissionDeniedModify
42 PermissionDeniedDelete
43 PermissionDeniedExecute
44 PermissionDeniedAdmin
45 ImpersonateOn
46 ImpersonateOff
47 DelegateOn
48 DelegateOff
49 UserDisabled
50 UserEnabled
51 AdminReplaceUser
52 AdminPageAccess
53 ImportObjects
54 ExportObjects
55 CustomApp
56 FormDataChange
57 ViewForm
58 AdminPageUpdate
59 UpdateDocumentProps
60 RollbackDocument
61 CancelDocumentCheckout
62 CheckoutDocument
63 AnonymousAccess
64 ObjectLock
65 ObjectUnlock
66 ObjectUnlockOther
67 ViewCaseData
68 CaseDataChange
69 CaseModeEntered
70 ReInit
71 UserLockedOut
72 AddGroupToPartition
73 RemoveGroupFromPartition
74 AddUserToPartition
75 RemoveUserFromPartition
76 AddAppEvent
77 UpdateAppEvent
78 DeleteAppEvent
79 KViewRun
80 MLPublish
81 UserProfileUpdated
82 StreamActionEvaluate
83 AdminDeleteLogs
84 DayPassLicenseExceeded
85 EmailUnsubscribeAdd
86 EmailUnsubscribeRemove
tblBusinessValue

This table contains information describing a Business Value.

COLUMN NAME

DATATYPE

LENGTH

DESCRIPTION

oBVID

varchar

36

Business Value ID

bvGroupName

nvarchar

256

BV GroupName

bvTypeFlag

int

 

Type of business value
oKVID varchar 36 The ID of the KView used to generate the value
sKVInput nvarchar 1024  
oDBID

varchar

36

 ID of the database connection to use
sSQL

varchar

MAX

 SQL statement ot generate the value
sRESTURL

varchar

1024

 The URL of the REST data source
fRESTGET tinyint    
sRESTUserID

varchar

256

 The USER ID for the REST data source
sRESTPassword

varchar

256

 The password for the REST data source
oRunAsUID varchar 36 The User ID under whose context the KView datasource will run.
fRESTJSON tinyint   Flag to use JSON

oFORMID

varchar

36

 
oFormCONDSETID

varchar

36

  
oDBID_REST

varchar

36

  
oDBID_RunAsUID

varchar

36

  
tblBusinessValueProperty

This table contains information describing the properties set for a Business Value.

COLUMN NAME

DATATYPE

LENGTH

DESCRIPTION

oBVPID

varchar

36

Business Value Property ID

oBVID

varchar

36

Business Value ID
sPropertyName

nvarchar

256

 Name of the property
nOrder int   The order in which the property will appear in the UI
nPropertyType int   The type of property
nBVSysVarType int    
nBVSysVarString

nvarchar

2014

  
nBVSysVarNumber decimal 18, 4  
tBVSysVarDateTime datetime    
sDBColumnName

nvarchar

256

 The name of the DB column from which the data will come
sKVColumnName

nvarchar

256

 The name of the KView column from which the data will come
nKVColumnOper int   The mathematical operation to perform on the KView column
sRESTXPath

nvarchar

2014

 The XPath XML
nRESTResultsMapping int    
sBVSysVarStringEx

nvarchar

MAX

  
oFCID

varchar

36

  
tblCase

This table contains information describing a case.

COLUMN NAME

DATATYPE

LENGTH

DESCRIPTION

oCASEID

varchar

36

Case ID

sInstName

nvarchar

256

Case Instance Name

fPropAudit

tinyint

 

 
sLinkWSID varchar 1024  
sCaseGroupName nvarchar 256 Case Group Name
tblCaseDashboard

This table contains information describing the Case Dashboard.

COLUMN NAME

DATATYPE

LENGTH

DESCRIPTION

oCASEDASHID

varchar

36

Case Instance ID

oCASEID

varchar

36

Case Property ID

oDASHID

varchar

36

Dashboard ID
sDashboardName nvarchar 256 Dashboard name
nOrder int    
tblCaseData

This table contains information describing Case property data.

COLUMN NAME

DATATYPE

LENGTH

DESCRIPTION

oCASEINSTID

varchar

36

Case Instance ID

oCASEPROPID

varchar

36

Case Property ID

nDataType

int

 

 
nRawDataType int    
sValue nvarchar NAX String Value
nValue decimal 18,4 Numeric value
tValue datetime   Datetime value
sPropertyName nvarchar 64 Property Name
fEncrypted tinyint   Whether the data is encrypted
sDisplayString nvarchar 256  
tblCaseInstance

This table contains information describing a case Instance.

COLUMN NAME

DATATYPE

LENGTH

DESCRIPTION

oCASEINSTID

varchar

36

Case Instance ID

oCASEID

varchar

36

Case ID
tblCaseProperty

This table contains information describing a case Property definitions.

COLUMN NAME

DATATYPE

LENGTH

DESCRIPTION

oCASEINSTID

varchar

36

Case Instance ID

oCASEID

varchar

36

Case ID
sPropertyName nvarchar 256 Property Name
sDesc nvarchar 1024 Property Description
nOrder int    
nDataType int    
nDefaultSysVarType int    
sDefaultSysVarString nvarchar 1024 Default value - string
nDefaultSysVarNumber decimal 18,4 Default value - number
tDefaultSysVarDateTime datetime   Default value - datetime
sDefaultSysVarStringEx nvarchar 1024 Default value - string expression
fEncrypt tinyint    
fUnique tinyint    
sDisplayName nvarchar 256 Display name to use for the Property
tblCat

This table contains information describing categories in a workgroup.

COLUMN NAME

DATATYPE

LENGTH

DESCRIPTION

oCATID  

varchar

36

Category’s ID

oID

varchar

36

Category’s object ID

oPID

varchar

36

Category’s partition ID
tblCatAttrib

This table contains information on a category’s attribute.

COLUMN NAME DATATYPE LENGTH DESCRIPTION

oCATID

varchar

36

ID of the attribute’s category

oATTID 

varchar

36

Attribute’s ID

oID 

varchar

36

Attribute's Object ID

oPID

varchar

36

Attribute’s partition ID

nDataType

int

 

 

nRawDataType

int

 

 

sValue

nvarchar

Max

The actual string value of the attribute

nValue

Decimal

18, 4

The actual number value of the attribute

tValue

datetime

 

The actually datetime value of the attribute
tblChart

This table contains information for the Chart Object.

COLUMN NAME DATATYPE LENGTH DESCRIPTION

oCHARTID

varchar

36

The ID of the Chart Object
sTitle nvarchar 64 Chart Title
sSkin nvarchar 64 Chart skin
oKVID

varchar

36

 ID of the KView to use for the chart
oBVID

varchar

36

 ID of the Business Value
nChartType int   The type of chart to display
fShowLegend tinyint   Flag to show the chart legend
nHeight int   Height of the chart
nHeightType int   Height type (fixed, auto)
nWidth int   Width of the chart
nWidthType int   Width type (fixed, auto)
nAutoscale int   Flag to autoscale the chart to its container
fShowCategoryAxisLabels tinyint   Flag to show the category (x-axis) labels
fShowValueAxisLabels tinyint   Flag to show the value (y-axis) labels
oKVCOLID_GroupBy

varchar

36

 The KView column to Group By
oBVPID_GroupBy

varchar

36

 The Business Value Property to Group By
nDateGroupBy int   Flag to determine whether to Group By date
oFORMID

varchar

36

 Form to associate with the Chart
oFORMID_GroupBy

varchar

36

 The Form to Group By
sBodyStyle nvarchar 1024 Styles for Chart body
sBodyCSS nvarchar MAX CSS stylesheet for body
oBackgroundImage

varchar

36

 Pointer to background image
sBgName nvarchar 256 Name of background image
nBgSize int   Size of image
nBgOpacity int   Opacity of image

This table contains information for the Chart's gauge range.

COLUMN NAME DATATYPE LENGTH DESCRIPTION

oCHARTGAUGEID

varchar

36

Chart Gauge ID

oCHARTID

varchar

36

 Chart ID
nAxis int    
nStartingPoint

decimal

18,4

  
nEndingPoint

decimal

18,4

  
sColor nvarchar 64  
nOrder int

This table contains information for the Chart's Series.

COLUMN NAME DATATYPE LENGTH DESCRIPTION

oCHARTSERIESID

varchar

36

Chart Series ID

oCHARTID

varchar

36

 Chart ID
nSeriesType int    
sGroupName nvarchar 256  
nMissingValues int    
nStackType int    
nAxis int    
oKVCOLID

varchar

36

 KView Column ID
oBVPID

varchar

36

 Business Value Property ID
sColor nvarchar 64  
nMarkerType int    
nAggregate int    
nOrder int   The order in which the series appears in the UI
fShowNumbers tinyint    
oCONDSETID

varchar

36

 The condition set associate with the series
sSeriesLabel

varchar

MAX

 The text label for the series
sSeriesName

varchar

256

 The Series Name
sToolTip

varchar

MAX

 The tool tip that appears when the user mouses over the series
fShowToolTip tinyint   Flag the determines whether the tooltip is shown
nDrillDownOpenLoc int    
nDrillDownOpenTarget int    
sDrilldownTarget nvarchar 1024  
sRefreshAfterDrilldown tinyint   Flag that determines whether the chart refreshes after a drilldown operation
oFCID varchar 36

varchar

36

ID of the condition set this condition is a part of

nOrder

int

 

 

nAndGroup

int

 

 

fPrompt

tinyint

1

 

nLSysVarType

int

 

 

sLSysVarString

nvarchar

1024

datetime

int

18, 4

datetime

tblConditionSet

This table contains information about all conditions associated with an item.

COLUMN NAME DATATYPE LENGTH DESCRIPTION

oCONDSETID 

varchar

36

ID of the condition set.

oPID

varchar

36

Partition’s ID

sDesc

nvarchar

1024

Description of the condition set

oContainerID

varchar

36

 
fAllowClientSide tinyint   Flag to run on the client instead of server
tblContent

This table contains information for objects in the content list.

COLUMN NAME DATATYPE LENGTH DESCRIPTION

oID 

varchar

36

Object ID

nType

int

 

Object’s type (Form, document, etc.)

nSubType

int

 

 

oPID

varchar

36

Partition’s ID

sName

nvarchar

256

Object’s name

sDesc

nvarchar

256

Object’s description

oCreateUser

varchar

36

ID of user that created the object

oUpdateUser

varchar

36

ID of user that last updated the object

tCreate

datetime

 

Time the object was created

tUpdate

datetime

 

Time the object was updated

tDelete

datetime

 

Time the object was deleted

nIcon

int

 

ID of the icon for the object

nSize

int

 

 

nVersion

int

 

Version number of the object

fDoNotShowOnRun

tinyint

1

 

v6_id

int

 

 

sUserName

nvarchar

 

String of the name of the user who created this object. Kept in case the user is deleted from the system.
oLockUID varchar 36 The ID of a content lock placed on the object.
tLockSince datetime   The datetime the content lock was placed on the object.
nSize2 bigint    
sIconColor nvarchar

64

  
tImport datetime    

*Possible values for nType and their corresponding object type are:

  • Document = 1,
  • Folder = 2,
  • Rule = 4,
  • Knowledge View = 5,
  • Workflow = 6,
  • Workflow Instance = 7,
  • Form = 14,
  • Form Instance = 15,
  • DropDown = 18,
  • DB Connection = 20,
  • Report = 21,
  • Timeline = 55,
  • Timeline Instance = 60,
 tblContentMap

This table contains the parent / child relationships between objects in the content list.

COLUMN NAME DATATYPE LENGTH DESCRIPTION

oPID

varchar

36

Partition’s ID

oChild 

varchar

36

ID of an object’s child

nChildType

int

 

Child’s object type (document, Form, etc.)

oParent 

varchar

36

ID of object’s parent.

nParentType

int

 

Parent object’s type

nMapType 

int

 

Child = 1,

Reference = 2,

PendingWfObject = 3,

CustomTask = 4,

PendingProjectObject = 5,

PendingProcessObject = 6,

Case = 7

tAdd

datetime

 

 

sGroupName

nvarchar

256

Group name of the object

tblDBConnection

This table contains information for a database connection.

COLUMN NAME DATATYPE LENGTH DESCRIPTION

oDBID 

varchar

36

This connection’s ID

sProvider

nvarchar

512

Database provider (e.g. …)

sConnection

nvarchar

1024

Address of the database

nDBType

int

 

Type of database (e.g. …)
sTableList nvarchar 200  

sClientToken

nvarchar

1024

OAuth client token

sClientSecret

nvarchar

1024

OAuth client secret

sAccessToken

nvarchar

1024

OAuth access token

sAccessTokenSecret

nvarchar

1024

OAuth access secret

sAccessUserid

nvarchar

64

UserID used to access authenticate connection

sAccessPassword

nvarchar

64

Password to authenticate connection

sSharePoint_SiteURL

nvarchar

1024

 

sSharePoint_UserID

nvarchar

128

 

sSharePoint_Password

nvarchar

64

 

sSharePoint_Domain

nvarchar

256

 
fEnableCache tinyint   Flag to enable caching on the datasource
nCacheSeconds int   The number of seconds to keep the cached data

tblForm

COLUMN NAME DATATYPE LENGTH DESCRIPTION

varchar

36

Form’s id

varchar

36

Document ID where the form is stored

nvarchar

256

Instantiated Form name

oStartWFID

varchar

36

ID of the workflow submitting the Form starts.

sLinkWFID

varchar

256

List of workflow IDs the Form links to

oScriptID

varchar

36

ID of attached Form script

fErrorPopup

tinyint

1

Boolean determining whether or not to display validation errors as popups

fCancelPopup

tinyint

1

Boolean: determines whether to display a warning when a user cancels form changes

fFieldAudit

tinyint

1

Boolean determining whether or not to audit Form field changes

fCT_FORM

tinyint

1

Boolean determining whether or not the form is a custom task form

fCT_WORKFLOW

tinyint

1

Determines whether or not the form is a workflow custom task

fCT_RULE

tinyint

1

Determines whether or not the form is a business rule custom task

fEmail

tinyint

1

Determines if this form can email

datetime

N/A

nvarchar

256

nvarchar

256

nvarchar

256

tinyint

1

int

int

varchar

36

 

sGroupName

nvarchar

256

Name of the group the Form belongs to

tinyint

1

Show one validation error, instead of all of them

sLinkPRID

varchar

256

List of timeline ID’s the Form links to

oStartPRID

varchar

36

ID of the timeline the Form starts

fCT_Project

tinyint

1

Determines if the form is a timeline custom task

fUseVB

tinyint

1

Boolean deciding whether to use VB script instead of C#

fHideDisabledButtons

tinyint

1

Boolean determining whether disabled buttons should be hidden on the Form

fEnableConcurrence

tinyint

1

Enables the ability for multiple users to make changes to the form at the same time

fEnableUserLock

tinyint

1

Determines whether a user can lock this form or not

fRemoveFromCaseOnSub tinyint   Flag ro remove from the existing case and create a new case on submission

tblGoal

This table contains information for a Process Director Goal.

COLUMN NAME DATATYPE LENGTH DESCRIPTION
oGOALID varchar 36 The ID of the Goal.
sFrequency nvarchar MAX The frequency with which the goal value is calculated
fMatchAll tinyint   Match all Values
fActive tinyint   Whether the goal is active
sGoalGroupName nvarchar 256 The group name of the Goal
tLastEvaluation datetime   When the Goal was last evaluated
tNextRun datetime   When the Goal will run next
sGoalValue nvarchar 1024 The Goal value
sGoalValuePrev nvarchar 1024 The value of the previous goal evaluation
fRunAlways tinyint    
oRunAsUID varchar 36 The user context to run under
oDBID_RunAsUID varchar 36  
tblGoalAction

This table contains information for a Process Director Goal's actions.

COLUMN NAME DATATYPE LENGTH DESCRIPTION
oGOALACTID varchar 36 The ID of the Goal action
oGOALID varchar 36 The ID of the Goal
oCONDSETID varchar 36 the ID of the condition set for the action
nActionType int   The action type of the Goal action
oID varchar 36 Object ID
sResult nvarchar 1024 The result of the Goal action
nOrder int   The order of the Goal action
sKVInput nvarchar 1024

tblObject

This table contains the binary information for an object.

Microsoft is deprecating the "image" column type in SQL Server. As a result, we've changed the image storage columns type on bObjectData to the varbinary(max) column type for users of v4.07 and higher. This means that any FULLTEXT - FTS (full text search) indexes on tblObject will be eliminated. These indexes will have to be recreated, if you are using them.

COLUMN NAME DATATYPE LENGTH DESCRIPTION

oOID 

varchar

36

This object’s ID

oDID

varchar

36

This object’s document ID

oPID

varchar

36

Object’s Partition ID

nVersion

int

 

This object’s current version number

sFileType

nvarchar

64

This object’s file type (Form definition, .docx etc.)

fManaged

tinyint

1

 

fWebViewable

tinyint

1

Is this object viewable in the browser?

fWrapper

tinyint

1

 

fTopmost

tinyint

1

 

fFileBacked

tinyint

1

 

tCreate

datetime

 

Time this object was created

bObjectData

varbinary(max)

 

The actual information defining the object.

nObjectLen

int

 

 
nObjectLen2 bigint    
tblObjVersion

This table contains the information for an object's version information.

COLUMN NAME DATATYPE LENGTH DESCRIPTION

oVID 

varchar

36

This object’s version ID

oPID

varchar

36

Object’s Partition ID
sLabel nvarchar 256 The Version label
sDesc nvarchar 1024 The version description
oID

varchar

36

  
nType int    
sName nvarchar 1024 the version name
nVersion int   The version number

nVersion

int

 

This object’s current version number
sXML nvarchar MAX  
oCreateUser varchar 36 The user that created the version

tCreate

datetime

 

Time this object was created

32

36

Pending = 0, the process is pending (not yet running

36

varchar

int

 

The type of permissions grant. This value can be:

9 = User

10 = Group

tinyint

1

Determines if this object can be read

fWrite

tinyint

1

Determines if this object can be written

fDelete

tinyint

1

Determines if this object can be deleted

fExecute

tinyint

1

tinyint

1

tinyint

1

tinyint

1

COLUMN NAME DATATYPE LENGTH DESCRIPTION

oPRINSTID

varchar

36

ID of the timeline instance

varchar

36

ID of the timeline definition.

nStatus

int

 

Status of this timeline instance (running etc.)

Pending = 0, the process is pending (not yet running

Active = 1,the process is running

Inactive = 2, the process has been completed

nTermReason

int

 

Reason the timeline has been terminated. Please see the Classes topic for a list of termination reasons and their associated integer code.

tStart

datetime

 

Time the instance was started

tEnd

datetime

 

Time this instance was ended

oCurrFORMINSTID

varchar

36

ID of the form instance being used by the timeline

varchar

36

 

sAdminComment

nvarchar

512

 

nPriority

int

varchar

36

varchar

36

varchar

36

varchar

36

nvarchar

MAX

tblProjectResult

This table contains information for a Timeline activity's results.

COLUMN NAME DATATYPE LENGTH DESCRIPTION

oRTID

varchar

36

ID of theresult
oPRID

varchar

36

 The Project Instance ID
oACTID

varchar

36

 The Activity ID
sResultName nvarchar 128 The Result string
sOfflineResultList nvarchar 256 String list of items that can satisfy the result
sDesc nvarchar 1024 Result description
nCondUserPercent int   The percent of users that must choose this result for it to be valid
nCondUserNum int   The number of users that must choose this result for it to be valid
nButtonOrder int   The order in which the result button will appear in the UI
nIcon int   The icon that will display on the result button
fDefaultResult tinyint   Flag that determines whether the result is the default result
fCommentReq tinyint   Flag that determines if a completion comment is required
fSaving tinyint    
oCONDSETID

varchar

36

 The ID of the condition set that is associated with the result
sConfirmText nvarchar 256 Text of the confirmation prompt
oDisplayCONDSETID

varchar

36

 the ID of the condition set that determines whether the result is visible
fAllowCompleteTaskList tinyint   Flag to allow completion from the task list
fSkipValidation tinyint   Flag to skip validation when this result is selected
sIconColor nvarchar 64  
sButtonBackColor nvarchar 64  
sButtonTextColor nvarchar 64

oKVID varchar 36  
sKVInput nvarchar 1024  
oRunAsUID varchar 36  
oDBID varchar 36  
sSQL nvarchar MAX SQL statement
sRESTURL nvarchar 1024  
fRESTGET tinyint    
sRESTUserID nvarchar 256 User name to pass for REST calls
sRESTPassword nvarchar 256 Password to pass for REST calls
sDistinctDataSetCol nvarchar 256  
oStartFORMID varchar 36  
oRunCONDSETID varchar 36  
fRESTJSON tinyint    
oDBID_RunAsUID varchar 36  
tblStreamActionMap

This table contains the data for Stream Action fields.

COLUMN NAME DATATYPE LENGTH DESCRIPTION
oSAMID varchar 36 Primary key
oSAID varchar 36 Parent stream action object
nOrder int    
oFCID varchar 36  
nValueSysVarType int   Data type
sValueSysVarString nvarchar 1024 Stores string values
nValueSysVarNumber decimal18,4   Stores numeric values
tValueSysVarDateTime datetime   Stores dates
sValueSysVarStringEx nvarchar MAX  
tblTaskList

This table contains all the tasks assigned to a user.

COLUMN NAME DATATYPE LENGTH DESCRIPTION

oTLID

varchar

36

Task List’s ID

nTaskListType

int

 

Task List’s type

oPID

varchar

36

Task List’s partition ID

oID

varchar

36

Task Lists’ object ID (usually Form)

nType

int

 

 

oSUINSTID

varchar

36

User  step information instance ID referenced by task list

oSTINSID

varchar

36

Step instance ID referenced by task list

oSTID

varchar

36

Step ID referenced by tasklist

oWFINSTID

varchar

36

Workflow Instance ID referenced by tasklist

oUID

varchar

36

ID of User these tasks are assigned to

sStepName

nvarchar

128

Name of the assigned step

nPriority

int

 

Task’s priority

sDesc

nvarchar

1024

Task’s description

tAdd

datetime

 

Time the activity / step was added to the task list

tDue

datetime

 

Time the activity / step is due

oACTUINSTID

varchar

36

ID of the activity user information instance

oACTINSTID

varchar

36

ID of the activity instance

oACTID

varchar

36

ID of the activity

oPRINSTID

varchar

36

ID of the timeline instance

sActName

nvarchar

128

Name of the activity

sSubTaskName

nvarchar

128

 Name of the subtask
sEmailAddress

nvarchar

256

 User's email address

Task Type Enumeration

The nTaskListType field will store integer values, as described below.

VALUE DESCRIPTION
0 NotSet - No task set
1 WorkflowTask - a workflow task assignment
2 CheckOut - a document is checked out
3 SavedFormInst - a form instance that is saved for later, but not submitted
4 ProjectTask - a project activity task assignment, i.e., a Process Timeline task.
5 ObjectCheckOut - a Content List object is checked out

COLUMN NAME DATATYPE LENGTH DESCRIPTION

oUID 

varchar

36

User’s record ID

sUserID

nvarchar

64

User’s ID

sUserName

nvarchar

128

nvarchar

256

User’s External ID

varchar

36

The ID of the user's Active Directory Synchronization Profile in Process Director

sPassword

nvarchar

64

User’s password

sEmailAddress

nvarchar

256

User’s email address

guidSessionID

nvarchar

36

GUID used to identify the user

sAutoLoginCookie

nvarchar

36

ID of cookie determining what user is automatically logged in

oCurrentPROFILEID

varchar

36

 

nAuthType

int

 

Indicates the authentication type for this user (0 – 3)

fSysAdmin

tinyint

1

Boolean. Determines whether the user is a System Administrator

fLoggedIn

tinyint

1

Boolean reflecting whether or not the user is logged in.

tLastLogin

datetime

 

datetime when the user last logged in

tLastActivity

datetime

 

datetime of the user’s last activity.

fDisabled

tinyint

1

Boolean determining whether the user is disabled

fSync

tinyint

1

Determines whether this user will sync with his portal usergroup

oDelegateUID

varchar

36

The user that this user’s work is delegated to

tCreate

datetime

 

datetime user was created

fSysConfigAdmin

tinyint

1

Boolean determining whether the user is a System Configuration Administrator

fSysUserAdmin

tinyint

1

Boolean determining whether the user is a user administrator

fSysInstallAdmin

tinyint

1

Boolean determining whether the user is a System Install Admin

fSysTroubleAdmin

tinyint

1

Boolean determining whether the user is a system trouble admin

fSysPartitionAdmin

tinyint

1

Boolean determining whether the user is a partition admin

fPendingUser

tinyint

1

 

guidTemp

varchar

36

 

fForcePwdChange

tinyint

1

Boolean determining whether or not the user will be forced to change his password before the next time he logs in.

fDelegationOn

tinyint

1

Determines whether this user is delegating all his tasks to oDelegateUID

fDelegationRange

tinyint

1

 

tDelegateStartTime

datetime

 

 

tDelegateEndTime

datetime

 

 

sCulture

varchar

64

 

nTZOffset

int

 

Amount of the time user’s local time zone is offset from the process director’s time zone

nvarchar

256

User’s domain

fAutoDST tinyint   Flag to determine whether to automatically set Daylight Savings Time
nNumLogins int   The number of logins for the user
nAvgLoginSecs int   The average number of seconds the user is logged in
fDisableEmail tinyint   Flag to disable the user's email notifications

sCustomString

nvarchar

1024

Optional custom string to associate with the user
tCustomDate datetime   Optional custom date to associate with the user
nCustomNumber int   Optional custom number to associate with the user
tLastPwdChange datetime   Datetime the user last changed the password
nLoginAttempts int   Number of times the user has logged in
fLockedOut tinyint   Flag that determines whether the user is locked out

nvarchar

1024

Optional custom string to associate with the user

sPhone

nvarchar

64

User’s phone number

nvarchar

1024

nvarchar

User’s title

nvarchar

256

nvarchar

256

User’s company

sDept

nvarchar

256

tinyint

varchar

oBRID

varchar

36

varchar

36

varchar

36

oDestSTID

varchar

36

int

 

Number of users that are assigned to the source step

int

 

 

nCondUserPercent

int

 

Percentage of users that must select this branch to move to the next step

nCondUserNum

int

 

Number of users that must select this branch to move to the next step

int

 

ID of the icon used for this branch

tinyint

1

tinyint

1

 

fCommentReq

tinyint

1

tinyint

1

nvarchar

64

varchar

36

nvarchar

256

 

oDisplayCONDSETID

varchar

36

ID of the condition determining whether this branch should display as a button on the Form.

fAllowCompleteTaskList

Tinyint

1

If set to true, allows this branch to be shown in a column in a task-like knowledge view.
fSkipValidation tinyint 1 Flag to determine whether validation should be skipped for this branch

sButtonBackColor nvarchar 64  
sButtonTextColor nvarchar 64

varchar

36

varchar

36

int

 

Status of this workflow instance (running etc.)

Pending = 0, the process is pending (not yet running

Active = 1,the process is running

Inactive = 2, the process has been completed

int

nvarchar

1024

datetime

datetime

tinyint

1

tblWfStepInst

This table contains information for an instance of a workflow step.

COLUMN NAME DATATYPE LENGTH DESCRIPTION

oSTINSTID

varchar

36

ID of the step instance

oSTID

varchar

36

ID of the step definition

oWFINSTID

varchar

36

ID of the workflow instance this step is in

nStatus

int

 

Status of this step (running, terminated, etc.)

Pending = 0, the process is pending (not yet running

Active = 1,the process is running

Inactive = 2, the process has been completed

nTermReason

int

 

Reason this step was terminated

oJumpToSTID

varchar

36

 

sMessage

nvarchar

1024

 

tStart

datetime

 

Time this step started

tEnd

datetime

 

Time this step finished

tDue

datetime

 

Time this step was due

tLastReminder

datetime

 

Time that this step last sent out a reminder

sStepName

nvarchar

128

Name of the step

nXcoor

int

 

X coordinate of this step’s graphic in the workflow definition

nYcoor

int

 

Y coordinate of this step’s graphic in the workflow definition

sBRIDsTaken

nvarchar

256

IDs of the branches this step took

sBranchNamesTaken

nvarchar

256

Names of the branches this step took

fError

tinyint

1

 

fDueDateProcessed

tinyint

1

 

oSubWFID

varchar

36

 

oAdminUID

varchar

36

 

sAdminComment

nvarchar

512

 

nTimesRun

int

 

Number of times this step has run

nTaskType

int

 

Type of task this step is (notification, user, etc.)

sEventName

nvarchar

256

 

oSubPRID

varchar

36

 

oSubWFINSTID

varchar

36

 

oSubPRINSTID

varchar

36

 

fEventPosted

tinyint

1

Indicates if the event was posted on this wait task.

varchar

36

This table contains data for all workflows.

COLUMN NAME DATATYPE LENGTH DESCRIPTION

oWFID

varchar

36

Workflow’s ID

sInstName

nvarchar

256

Name of the instantiated workflow

nPriority

int

 

Workflow’s priority

tinyint

1

Boolean: Determines whether the workflow should be deleted after completion

int

 

Number of seconds until workflow’s due date

varchar

36

ID of the email template used for notifications

tinyint

1

Determines whether attachments to the workflow should be copied to sub-workflows

fSubWfCopyUp

tinyint

1

Determines whether attachments to the workflow should be copied to parent processes

sLinkFORMID

varchar

256

ID of the form this workflow is linked to

oScriptDID

varchar

36

Document ID of attached script

sCopyDownGroup

nvarchar

256

The group name of documents copied down to sub processes

sCopyUpGroup

nvarchar

256

The group name of documents copied up to parent processes
nAutoShowTask int   Automatically show the task for the user if it is the next task
